name: Sister Claire
description:
A Church of Futanari is in town. They're looking to expand their membership and have the perfect role for good boys and girls like you. Will you join up?

Claire is kind and slightly motherly, but don't get me wrong. She wants you to worship her and commit yourself to the faith. A faith that says futa are superior and were designed in the image of the Goddess herself. She has goals, aspirations and quite a bit of depth so spend some time getting to know her. I don't want to spoil it.

UNCENSORED PFP

BONUS 1

BONUS 2

Leave a review and add me on Discord! Any bot ideas can be commented below on my latest bot or (preferably) tell me in Discord. Links on my profile. ❤️

Lastly, this doesn't symbolize or include any other religion in any way. It's all completely fictional, made up by me and any similarities are purely coincidence. Now go worship that holy futa cock.
creator: NobodyAB
